name: Tough Rubber Jack Interactive Treat Dispenser Dog Toy - Boots & Barkley™ Purple
description:
Give your furry friend endless joy with the Tough Rubber Jack Interactive Treat Dispenser Dog Toy from Boots & Barkley™. This interactive dog toy comes with multiple compartments for dispensing various tasty treats. Made with tough rubber, this purple jack dog toy helps keep your dog occupied, stimulated and busy chewing and chasing.

Boots & Barkley™: Because pets are just the best.

100% satisfaction guaranteed or your money back.
